title: eupatorium tozziifolium var. bracteatum
intro: Eupatorium tozziifolium var. bracteatum, also known as the fragrant eupatorium or fragrant boneset, is a flowering plant species native to South America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its volatile oils, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, headache, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eupatorium tozziifolium var. bracteatum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and relieve respiratory congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
